sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Oracle Corporation Faces Class Action Lawsuit; Investors May Be Entitled to Compensation
feed.summary: The Rosen Law Firm has filed a class action lawsuit against Oracle Corporation, alleging that the company's senior note offering documents contained misleading statements. The lawsuit claims Oracle failed to disclose its need for significant debt to build AI infrastructure, which could impact bond creditworthiness and lead to investor losses. Investors who purchased Oracle's senior notes may be eligible for compensation through the firm's contingency fee arrangement.

feed.title: Glacier Bancorp Inc (NYSE:GBCI) Reports Mixed Q4 2025 Results with Revenue Beat and EPS Miss
feed.summary: Glacier Bancorp Inc. reported mixed financial results for Q4 2025, with revenue of $306.5 million exceeding analyst estimates by 35% but diluted EPS of $0.49 falling short of the $0.5032 consensus due to significant acquisition-related costs. The bank's CEO highlighted 2025 as a year of "strong performance" and "significant strategic progress," driven by growth through acquisition. Despite the EPS miss, the stock experienced modest gains leading up to the report, indicating a neutral market reception.

feed.title: Is Parsons’ New Murabba Infrastructure Mandate Reshaping The Investment Case For Parsons (PSN)?
feed.summary: Parsons Corporation secured a significant 60-month contract as Infrastructure Lead Design Consultant for Saudi Arabia's New Murabba urban development, including the iconic Mukaab structure. This deal strengthens Parsons' presence in Middle Eastern giga-projects and aligns with its strategy to evolve into a higher-margin, tech-enabled infrastructure and defense solutions provider. While not expected to dramatically alter short-term growth, the contract provides long-duration work and reinforces the company's backlog momentum amid previous revenue guidance adjustments.

feed.title: Third Coast Bancshares Shares Steady After Q4 Profit Rise
feed.summary: Third Coast Bancshares (NYSE: TCBX) shares remained steady after reporting a rise in Q4 and full-year 2025 profits. The company achieved record net income for the full year and continued to grow loans and deposits, despite broader sector pressures on regional banks. Third Coast also announced a definitive merger agreement with Keystone Bancshares Inc. and a transfer of its stock listing to the NYSE and NYSE Texas.

feed.title: Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) Stock Price Down 1.3% - What's Next?
feed.summary: Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) shares fell 1.3% on Friday, trading at $217.94 with lower-than-average volume. Despite positive analyst sentiment, including a "Strong Buy" upgrade from Zacks and raised price targets due to expected AI-chip and DRAM demand, there are offsetting risks such as increased put-option buying and recent insider selling. The article details analyst ratings, price performance, past earnings, dividend announcements, and insider transactions, providing a comprehensive overview of the company's financial health and market position.

feed.title: News | San Diego-area office property sells at discount
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities has sold a fully leased one-story office property in Carlsbad, California, for $64.1 million. This sale represents a significant discount compared to its previous sale price, with the property trading at approximately $354 per square foot. The buyer of record is MJ Make LLC.

feed.title: Tractor Supply and McCoy Rodeo Bring PRORODEO to OKC’s New OG&E Coliseum
feed.summary: Tractor Supply Company and McCoy Rodeo are partnering to bring PRORODEO events to Oklahoma City's new OG&E Coliseum, following the implosion of the historic Jim Norick Arena. This collaboration aims to continue Oklahoma City's rich rodeo tradition, with the first PRORODEO event at the new venue scheduled for January 23-25, 2026. The partnership also includes additional rodeo events nationwide in 2026, highlighting the values of hard work and community central to the Western lifestyle.

feed.title: Paycom (PAYC) Welcomes Back Jeff York as Chief Sales Officer
feed.summary: Paycom Software (PAYC) has announced the re-appointment of Jeff York as Chief Sales Officer, effective January 23, 2026. York previously held the role from 2007 to 2021 and will succeed Amy Walker, who is transitioning to a consultancy position. The article highlights Paycom's strong financial health, revenue growth, and profitability, while also noting a potential warning sign concerning financial manipulation and a trend of insider selling.

feed.title: Wall Street Analysts See a 50.99% Upside in Riot Platforms, Inc. (RIOT): Can the Stock Really Move This High?
feed.summary: Wall Street analysts are forecasting a significant upside for Riot Platforms, Inc. (RIOT), with a mean price target of $27.33, suggesting a 51% increase from its last trading price. This optimism is supported by a strong consensus among analysts regarding the company's earnings prospects and a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) rating. While price targets alone are not a definitive investment guide, the agreement in analyst revisions for RIOT's EPS estimates indicates potential for near-term stock appreciation.

feed.title: Akanda Raises $7 Million Through Convertible Note Private Placement
feed.summary: Akanda Corp. (AKAN) successfully closed a $7 million private placement of 12-month convertible notes on January 23, 2026. The proceeds will be allocated to marketing, working capital, and debt reduction, with the aim of bolstering the company's balance sheet and supporting post-acquisition growth plans following its acquisition of First Towers and Fiber Corp. This capital raise underscores Akanda's strategy to leverage capital markets for operational and strategic expansion.

feed.title: Adagene Provides Business Update and 2026 Objectives
feed.summary: Adagene Inc. announced unaudited cash and cash equivalents of $74.5 million as of December 31, 2025, providing a sufficient financial runway into late 2027. The company highlighted key accomplishments from 2025, including progress in its muzastotug clinical trials and strategic collaborations with Sanofi, Third Arc Bio, Exelixis, and ConjugateBio. Adagene also outlined its 2026 objectives, focusing on further clinical data updates for muzastotug in various cancer indications and securing additional partnerships.

feed.title: What Can Investors Anticipate in Williams-Sonoma's Fourth Quarter 2025 Earnings Release
feed.summary: Williams-Sonoma (WSM) is set to release its Q4 2025 earnings, with analysts expecting an EPS of $2.88, a 12.2% decrease year-over-year, despite the company consistently beating EPS projections in previous quarters. For the full fiscal year 2025, EPS is predicted to be $8.69, a slight dip from 2024, but is projected to increase in fiscal 2026. The stock has underperformed the S&P 500 over the past year, and the company has faced significant tariff pressures and increased inventory levels, yet market experts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for WSM shares.

feed.title: Six Flags amends cooperation agreement with Dendur Capital
feed.summary: Six Flags Entertainment Corporation amended its cooperation agreement with Dendur Capital LP on January 21, 2026. The revised terms allow Dendur Capital to acquire cash-settled derivative securities decoupled from Six Flags' underlying securities. The amendment limits Dendur's total economic exposure, including both common stock and derivatives, to 14.99% of the company.

feed.title: Marathon Petroleum begins national contract talks with union
feed.summary: Marathon Petroleum and the United Steelworkers union have begun national contract negotiations for U.S. refinery and chemical plant workers, with the current agreement expiring in a week. The union is seeking significant wage increases, limits on healthcare costs, and policies regarding AI use, and a failure to reach an agreement could lead to a strike involving thousands of workers. Marathon, as the lead negotiator for petrochemical companies, expressed commitment to productive talks.

feed.title: Enphase Energy to Cut Jobs as End of Tax Credits Dents Demand
feed.summary: Enphase Energy plans to lay off about 6% of its workforce, approximately 160 employees, and restructure its operations. This move comes as the expiration of a federal tax credit has reduced demand for residential solar panels. The company aims to simplify its organization, tighten spending, and prioritize future investments.

feed.title: Q/C Technologies Adds OpenAI Expert to Board, Advisory
feed.summary: Q/C Technologies has appointed Chelsea Voss, an OpenAI technical staff member, to its board of directors and entered into a 12-month consulting agreement with her. Voss, known for her work on major AI systems like GPT-4 and ChatGPT, will contribute her expertise to Q/C Technologies' efforts to commercialize photonic, quantum-class computing solutions. Her compensation includes a monthly fee, restricted stock units, and stock options, aiming to strengthen the company's position in advanced computing markets.

feed.title: CoStar’s Homes.com Data Signals Turning Point In Housing Affordability Story
feed.summary: CoStar Group's Homes.com reports the first year-over-year improvement in U.S. home affordability since 2020, driven by a 17% increase in housing inventory. This shift positions CoStar as a key player in the evolving residential real estate market, with CEO Andy Florance recognized among the top executives. The data provides valuable insights for investors watching how CoStar leverages its platforms amidst changing market conditions, though current profit margins and one-off items have impacted short-term earnings.

feed.title: Albemarle (ALB) Is Up 16.2% After Bullish Lithium Analyst Upgrades Has The Bull Case Changed?
feed.summary: Albemarle (ALB) has seen a 16.2% increase in its stock price following a wave of bullish analyst upgrades, driven by improving lithium fundamentals and strong earnings expectations. Analysts are confident in Albemarle's global lithium footprint and its crucial role in energy storage and electric vehicles. While this optimism may alleviate concerns about past losses and a rich sales multiple, it also raises expectations for future execution, especially given the historical volatility of lithium prices.

feed.title: Retirement Industry People Moves
feed.summary: This article details several leadership changes within the retirement industry. Steph Jackson, head of T. Rowe Price Investment Management, is set to retire at the end of 2026, with Steven Krichbaum succeeding her. OneDigital has promoted Bill Carew to president and Camry Blaising to chief operating officer, while MissionSquare Retirement has hired Adam Harris and Jacob Dreiling for its managed accounts team. Norm Law, an AI-native law firm, also announced the appointment of three new partners, including Mike Schmidtberger as chairman and head of investment funds and regulatory practice.

feed.title: Sealed Air Sets February 25 Vote on $42.15-Per-Share Buyout by CD&R Affiliate
feed.summary: Sealed Air (SEE) has scheduled a virtual special meeting for February 25, 2026, for shareholders to vote on a proposed merger. An affiliate of private equity firm Clayton, Dubilier & Rice (CD&R) plans to acquire the company, offering $42.15 per share in cash, which would take Sealed Air private. The board of directors has unanimously recommended that shareholders approve the merger.

feed.title: Fitch Upgrades Turkey’s Rating Outlook, Moody’s Stays Put
feed.summary: Fitch Ratings has upgraded Turkey's rating outlook to positive from stable, citing a continued decline in inflation and robust foreign currency reserves. The long-term foreign currency rating remains at BB-, three levels below investment grade. This upgrade reflects reduced "external vulnerabilities" and persistent tightening of macroeconomic policies, with Turkey last receiving a Fitch upgrade in 2024.

feed.title: Jeff York Returns as Paycom’s Chief Sales Officer
feed.summary: Jeff York has returned to Paycom Software, Inc. as Chief Sales Officer, effective January 23, 2026. York previously held this role from 2007 to 2021 and has since served as Paycom's Leadership Strategist. He replaces Amy Walker, who is transitioning to a consulting role, and will focus on driving growth and delivering full solution automation for clients.

feed.title: Jeff York Returns as Paycom’s Chief Sales Officer
feed.summary: Paycom Software, Inc. announced that Jeff York has rejoined the company as Chief Sales Officer, effective January 23, 2026. York previously held this role from 2007 to 2021 before serving as Paycom’s Leadership Strategist. He replaces Amy Walker, who is transitioning to a consulting role.

feed.title: The Truth About Assurant Inc (AIZ): Quiet Stock, Loud Moves – Are You Sleeping on This?
feed.summary: Assurant Inc (AIZ) is presented as a "quiet stock" with significant underlying moves, contrasting with more volatile meme stocks. The article highlights Assurant's business model, focusing on protection plans for devices, renters insurance, and extended warranties, emphasizing its recurring revenue and data-driven risk management. It suggests AIZ is a solid long-term investment for those seeking stability and dividends rather than viral hype.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Gives Up Naming Rights To Miami Skyscraper
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Co. has relinquished the naming and signage rights for the 47-story Wells Fargo Center in Downtown Miami, significantly reducing its office footprint in the building to 25K SF. This move comes as the bank shifts some operations to West Palm Beach and has been downsizing its workforce. The vacated space in the 85% leased tower is being filled, with only a floor and a half remaining available.

feed.title: Research Alert: CFRA Reiterates Sell Opinion On Shares Of Starbucks Corp
feed.summary: CFRA has reiterated a "Sell" opinion on shares of Starbucks Corp. This alert was published by MT Newswires. The article also mentions Unity Software's Q4 earnings, which showed a 35% revenue increase year-over-year to $609 million, exceeding estimates, despite a quarterly loss of 66 cents per share.

feed.title: Honda to End US Fuel Cell JV with GM by 2026
feed.summary: Honda is set to end the production of its current fuel cell system at its US joint venture with General Motors, Fuel Cell System Manufacturing LLC (FCSM), by the end of 2026. This decision signals a strategic shift towards Honda's independently developed next-generation fuel cell system, reinforcing its commitment to expanding its hydrogen business as a core segment. Despite dissolving the JV, Honda emphasized its continued investment in hydrogen technology, aligning with its broader goal of achieving carbon neutrality by 2050.

feed.title: International Paper Divests Global Cellulose Fibers to Refocus
feed.summary: International Paper (IP) has completed the sale of its Global Cellulose Fibers business to American Industrial Partners for $1.5 billion. This divestment, which involved a business generating about $2.3 billion in 2024 revenue, allows International Paper to sharpen its focus on sustainable packaging and core regional markets. The company's stock currently holds a "Hold" rating from analysts and is considered "Neutral" by TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, due to financial performance challenges despite an attractive dividend yield.

feed.title: Garmin Ltd. Bets Big on Wearables, Aviation, and Auto Tech — And It’s Working
feed.summary: Garmin Ltd. has evolved into a diversified hardware powerhouse, excelling in wearables, aviation, marine, and automotive OEM sectors by focusing on premium, purpose-built, and reliable technology. The company thrives by specializing in high-consequence scenarios, offering multi-week battery life and deep analytics in its devices, and building expansive ecosystems that span land, sea, and air. This strategy supports a strong stock performance for GRMN, driven by demand for advanced sports wearables, resilient aviation business, and sticky marine contracts.

feed.title: Delta and United Earnings Point to Less Turbulence Ahead
feed.summary: Airline stocks, including Delta and United, are showing signs of recovery and strong financial performance despite previous challenges like high operating costs, economic uncertainty, and pilot and air traffic controller shortages. Delta reported record free cash flow and consistent earnings beats, while United announced record revenue and boosted future guidance, with both companies' stocks receiving favorable analyst ratings and showing significant upside potential. American Airlines is also poised to report earnings, with expectations of strong growth and an attractive valuation.

feed.title: Southland Holdings Faces $57 Million Judgment in Legal Dispute
feed.summary: Southland Holdings' subsidiary, American Bridge, recently received an adverse judgment of $57 million stemming from a construction project at the Washington State Convention Center. American Bridge plans to appeal this ruling. Southland Holdings is currently evaluating the judgment's impact on its Credit Agreement and financial reporting.

feed.title: Vivakor Converts Note Obligations Into Additional Common Shares
feed.summary: Vivakor (VIVK) recently announced that two lenders converted $41,165 of outstanding note obligations into 9,215,789 common shares on January 16, 2026. This conversion stems from $4.35 million in convertible promissory notes issued by the company in June 2025. Despite strong revenue growth, Vivakor faces challenges with persistent unprofitability and a deeply negative return, leading Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, to rate VIVK as Neutral.

feed.title: Jabil Completes $1 Billion Senior Notes Debt Offering
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. (JBL) successfully completed a $1 billion public debt offering on January 23, 2026, issuing senior notes due in 2029 and 2033. These unsecured notes, which will make semi-annual interest payments, include call options and change-of-control repurchase rights, alongside covenants restricting further leverage and certain structural transactions. The offering was managed by a syndicate of major banks, utilizing Jabil's existing shelf registration.

feed.title: QIAGEN N.V.: Release according to Article 40, Section 1 of the WpHG
feed.summary: QIAGEN N.V. has released an announcement regarding a notification from the AFM (the Netherlands Authority For the Financial Markets) concerning voting rights. The notification, dated January 21, 2026, details Goldman Sachs Group Inc.'s holdings in QIAGEN N.V., including both real and potential voting rights from various types of shares, warrants, call options, swaps, and convertible bonds. Goldman Sachs Group Inc. holds a total capital and voting interest of 2.92%.

feed.title: Alan Kumler Sells 12,043 Shares of United Community Banks (NYSE:UCB) Stock
feed.summary: Alan Kumler, CAO of United Community Banks (NYSE:UCB), sold 12,043 shares at an average price of $35.36, decreasing his stake by over 36%. Following this, the company's shares traded down, and it reported mixed quarterly earnings, missing EPS estimates but exceeding revenue expectations. Analysts currently rate UCB as a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $37.50.

feed.title: Paycom Appoints Jeff York as Chief Sales Officer Effective January 23, 2026
feed.summary: Paycom has announced the appointment of Jeff York as Chief Sales Officer, effective January 23, 2026, replacing Amy Walker. York, who previously served as CSO from 2007 to 2021, brings over three decades of sales management experience and is expected to drive continued growth and enhance the application of Paycom's innovative AI technology. Analysts have mixed views on PAYC stock, with an average 1-year price target of $201.82.

feed.title: Vue, Europe's largest privately owned cinema chain, has resolved a payment dispute with Coca-Cola Europacific, the Coca-Cola bottling giant. Read more below.
feed.summary: Vue, Europe's largest privately owned cinema chain, has successfully resolved a payment dispute with Coca-Cola Europacific, the Coca-Cola bottling giant. This settlement comes after Coca-Cola Europacific had threatened liquidation proceedings against Vue due to unpaid bills. The resolution ensures Vue can continue its operations without the threat of liquidation.

feed.title: Dominion Energy prepares for widespread outages as winter storm approaches Virginia
feed.summary: Dominion Energy is preparing for significant power outages due to an approaching winter storm in Virginia, which is expected to bring a dangerous combination of snow and especially ice. Line workers are on standby, and the company has implemented an all-hands-on-deck approach, warning that ice can lead to widespread problems and road unpassability that could delay restoration efforts. Customers are urged to report specific outage details through the mobile app and prepare for potential disruptions.

feed.title: Exclusive-Barrick’s North America spin-off hinges on Newmont’s approval, documents show
feed.summary: Documents seen by Reuters and former Barrick executives show that Canadian miner Barrick's plan to spin off its North American assets, including Nevada Gold Mines, Pueblo Viejo, and Fourmile, requires the approval of its joint venture partner Newmont. Newmont holds the first right of refusal on Barrick's stake in Nevada Gold Mines and consent is needed for any share transfers, which gives Newmont significant power over Barrick's restructuring efforts despite being the minority owner. This situation marks a reversal from past attempts where Barrick tried to acquire Newmont.

feed.title: 374Water director resigns as Stephen Jones refocuses leadership
feed.summary: Stephen J. Jones resigned from 374Water's Board of Directors on January 21, 2026, to dedicate more time to his responsibilities as Interim CEO and President, as well as commitments to two other public company boards. The company clarified that his resignation was not due to any disagreements regarding operations or policies. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, assesses SCWO as Neutral, citing heavy losses and negative free cash flow despite strong revenue growth, although recognizing improved growth potential through guidance and partnerships.

feed.title: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) Stock Price Down 1.5% After Insider Selling
feed.summary: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) shares dropped 1.5% following the disclosure of significant insider selling by Kenneth Duda, who sold 56,000 shares for approximately $7.19 million. Despite this, Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $164.44, and the company recently beat revenue estimates with 27.5% year-over-year growth. Institutional investors have also shown varied activity, with some increasing and others decreasing their stakes in ANET.

feed.title: Petroleo Brasileiro SA Petrobras Options Spot-On: On January 23rd, 139.93K Contracts Were Traded, With 1.12 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On January 23rd, Petroleo Brasileiro SA Petrobras (PBR.US) experienced significant options trading activity, with a total volume of 139.93K contracts. Put options constituted 48.49% and call options 51.51% of the total transactions. The open interest for PBR.US options reached approximately 1.12 million contracts, which is 87.76% of the 30-day average.

feed.title: Michael George Rhodes Purchases 23,800 Shares of Ally Financial (NYSE:ALLY) Stock
feed.summary: Ally Financial CEO Michael George Rhodes recently purchased 23,800 shares of the company's stock, increasing his total holdings by over 92%. This insider buying follows Ally's strong fourth-quarter earnings beat and the authorization of a $2 billion share buyback program. Despite concerns regarding auto-lending weakness and capital allocation risks, analysts currently rate the stock as a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $50.50.

feed.title: FedEx planning new ‘Hercules’ facility at World Hub
feed.summary: FedEx is planning a new "Hercules" facility at its World Hub at the Memphis International Airport. The 1.6 million-square-foot facility will incorporate a state-of-the-art automated sort system. This development signifies an upgrade to FedEx's sorting capabilities in Memphis.

feed.title: Align Technology advances digital dentistry with innovative practices
feed.summary: Align Technology is transforming digital dentistry by focusing on innovative solutions to improve both treatment efficiency and patient outcomes. The company's 'Innovators Behind the Smile' series highlights professionals like Dr. Tommy Dorsey, who are adopting these cutting-edge technologies in orthodontics. This initiative aims to redefine the dental experience and enhance lives beyond just teeth straightening.

feed.title: AT&T expands fiber internet to 2 million Georgia homes and businesses
feed.summary: AT&T has expanded its fiber internet service to over 2 million homes and businesses across Georgia, celebrating a nearly $17 billion investment in the state's networks over the past five years. While this expansion aims to boost economic growth and education, challenges remain in providing reliable internet to rural South Georgia communities. State leaders acknowledge that continued investment and collaboration are crucial to closing the digital divide and ensuring connectivity for all Georgians.

feed.title: A Look At Colgate-Palmolive (CL) Valuation As Analyst Upgrades Highlight Defensive Appeal
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) is gaining analyst attention as investors rotate towards defensive consumer names. Despite recent share price gains and a valuation that suggests it's slightly undervalued according to one narrative, its P/E ratio is higher than industry averages, signaling less room for error. The article encourages investors to analyze financial data and consider risks, emphasizing that the content is general in nature and not financial advice.

feed.title: KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY) Director Sells $710,789.30 in Stock
feed.summary: KeyCorp Director Trina Evans sold 32,695 shares of the company's stock for $710,789.30, reducing her stake by 35.77% to 58,719 shares. This transaction occurred after KeyCorp surpassed Q4 earnings and revenue estimates. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.205 per share.

feed.title: RLI (NYSE:RLI) CEO Buys $287,250.00 in Stock
feed.summary: RLI Corp. CEO Craig Kliethermes recently purchased 5,000 shares of the company's stock for $287,250, increasing his stake by 3.6%. This insider transaction occurred shortly after RLI exceeded Q4 earnings and revenue expectations ($0.94 EPS vs. ~$0.76 consensus), demonstrating strong underlying business performance, including robust underwriting income and strategic reinsurance adjustments. The company maintains a "Hold" consensus rating from Wall Street analysts, with a target price of $67.67, alongside a stable quarterly dividend.

feed.title: NextEra Energy (NYSE:NEE) EVP Sells $920,210.00 in Stock
feed.summary: NextEra Energy (NYSE:NEE) EVP Ronald Reagan sold 10,826 shares of the company's stock on January 22nd for a total of $920,210. This transaction reduced his ownership by 40.90% to 15,643 shares. The stock is currently trading near its 52-week high, and analysts have a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $91.94.
